step_rationale: miR-155 amplifies inflammatory cytokine signaling and monocyte activation in plaque.
mechanism: miR-155 promotes vascular inflammation and plaque destabilization by suppressing anti-inflammatory targets (BCL-6, STAT-3) and enhancing monocyte/macrophage inflammatory responses.

references.title: microRNA-155 Is Decreased During Atherosclerosis Regression and Is Increased in Urinary Extracellular Vesicles During Atherosclerosis Progression.
